reason: TEST_INVENTORY.yaml defines test cases covering all FR-01 through FR-05 acceptance criteria. Each test entry references the correct FR ID, includes a description, and specifies expected outcomes consistent with SRS.md acceptance criteria.

TEST_INVENTORY.yaml — FR-02 test cases cover state transitions pending→running→done|failed|timeout
TEST_INVENTORY.yaml — FR-03 test cases cover retry backoff and circuit breaker OPEN/HALF_OPEN/CLOSED transitions
